name: create-block/custom-faq-block
title: Custom Faq Block
description: A dynamic FAQ block featuring CRUD operations, item reorder, rich text editing, and interactive frontend accordion UI.

default.question: What is a Gutenberg block?
default.answer: A Gutenberg block is a modular content component in WordPress that allows users to build pages visually using reusable elements.

default.question: Can I edit these FAQs after publishing?
default.answer: Yes, all FAQ items are stored as block attributes and can be edited directly inside the Gutenberg editor at any time.

default.question: Does this block support dynamic updates?
default.answer: Yes, the block updates in real time using React state and persists changes through WordPress block attributes.

default.question: Can I reorder FAQ items?
default.answer: Yes, you can move items up and down to change their order using built-in reorder controls.

default.question: Is the frontend interactive?
default.answer: Yes, the frontend uses vanilla JavaScript to provide accordion functionality with smooth open/close animations.

default.question: Can I delete FAQ items?
default.answer: Yes, each FAQ item includes a delete option with a confirmation prompt to avoid accidental removal.

default.question: Does this block use React?
default.answer: Yes, the editor side uses React via the WordPress block editor environment.

default.question: Can I style the FAQ block?
default.answer: Yes, the block includes custom SCSS styling and can be extended or overridden with theme styles.

default.question: Is this production ready?
default.answer: It is a fully functional custom Gutenberg block suitable for production with minor enhancements for scalability.

default.question: What features does this FAQ block include?
default.answer: It includes add, edit, delete, reorder, expand/collapse, rich text support, and frontend accordion functionality.
